items.title: Claude AI setup follow-up with Pareto
items.summary: Ivan from Pareto Talent responded with guidance on integrating multiple Google accounts with Claude, offering Omi pendant, and advising against Screenpipe. Yanina can coordinate setup call and address confirmation.
items.actionNeeded: Review AI setup options and decide whether to schedule setup call with Ivan or have Yanina coordinate Omi pendant delivery.

items.title: Toxin Assessment document needs organizing
items.summary: Yanina shared a Toxin Assessment Vidalytics document that needs to be moved into the appropriate VYVE Marketing folder.
items.actionNeeded: Follow up with Yanina to confirm the document has been properly filed in VYVE Marketing folder.
